name: USDC-farm (frequent harvest, top rate)
recommendations: Heavy tax drag: ~37.0% of the yield goes to tax; after-tax APR is ~7.56%. Consider longer holds or fewer harvests to reduce the drag. (Not tax advice.)
High marginal rate: most income is taxed at the top ordinary rate. Holding to qualify for the long-term rate would cut the effective rate substantially. (Not tax advice.)
Frequent taxable events: ~52 harvests/year each realise income short-term, blocking long-term treatment. Harvest less often or auto-compound without realising. (Not tax advice.)

name: stETH (long hold, no harvests)
recommendations: Light tax drag: after-tax APR ~3.40% retains most of the headline yield. (Not tax advice.)
Qualifies long-term: a meaningful share of income is taxed at the preferential long-term rate, lowering the blended effective rate. (Not tax advice.)
